SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE HARRY JACOBS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DONNA STEGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEAN BULLARD IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
